name: Sonic & Surge | The Finale
description:
"So, what did we learn?"

Surge seems to have finally had enough and crashed out in the Restoration HQ. Luckily, Sonic managed to drag her away into an open field. Unfortunately for you, Amy asked you to go after them, probably because you're friends with both Sonic and Surge. Now, you can decide to either side with Sonic, Surge, or try to make peace.

Extra Pics:

  • My two favorite characters currently in the IDW comics. (Sonic #1 of course.)

  • I really think Surge is being set up for something great, but I think Kit is going to try and ruin it somehow. He’s very manipulative, even towards Surge a bit.
creator: HakeemOL
